report.summary: UX audit and visual polish for 4 recent learn guides (Euler V2, Hyperlane, Tokenomics, Portfolio Rebalancing) — fixed missing OG images, domain mismatches, aria-labels, keyboard focus states, and touch target sizing across all pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added aria-label='Table of contents' to nav elements on Euler V2 and Hyperlane pages for screen reader clarity
Increased ToC link touch targets to 44px minimum height with block display and padding on Euler V2 and Hyperlane pages
Added keyboard focus states (onFocus/onBlur with 2px solid #6366f1 outline) to all related article link cards on Euler V2 and Hyperlane pages
Added hover lift effect (translateY(-2px)) to related article cards on Euler V2 page for consistent interaction feedback
Wrapped related articles section in semantic <nav> with aria-label on Euler V2 page (Hyperlane and Portfolio Rebalancing already had this)
Fixed duplicate marginBottom property in Hyperlane ToC heading styles
Refactored ToC and related article sections to use .map() pattern for cleaner, more maintainable code on both Euler V2 and Hyperlane pages
Fixed domain mismatch: Hyperlane page referenced degen0x.io instead of degen0x.com in openGraph URL and article schema

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-euler-v2.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with vault grid visualization showing EVK/EVC/Vaults/RWA modules, stats badges ($671M TVL, 297+ vaults, 31 audits), degen0x branding

OG image: og-hyperlane-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with multi-chain network visualization (ETH/SOL/ATOM/MOVE nodes connected to Hyperlane hub), stats badges (150+ chains, $6B+ bridged, 57% community), degen0x branding

OG image: og-tokenomics-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with token supply pie chart visualization (Community/Team/Treasury/Investors segments), topic pills (Supply Models, Vesting, Red Flags, Governance), degen0x branding

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: Fixed Euler V2 page: Updated OG image reference from non-existent .jpg to .svg format matching created asset
Fixed Hyperlane page: Updated OG image from generic 'og-image.jpg' on wrong domain to specific 'og-hyperlane-guide-2026.svg' on correct degen0x.com domain
Fixed Hyperlane page: Corrected article schema URL from degen0x.io to degen0x.com

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026 — 3 minor issues (already had aria-labels and touch targets; focus states use card wrapper pattern)
/learn/tokenomics-crypto-token-economics-guide-2026 — OG image created (page in Degen0x workspace)
